parameter_slots.error_or_symptom: <observable failure, e.g. 'slow query on dashboard' or 'workers stuck in pending'>

prompt_template: Investigate this issue in {project}: {error_or_symptom}. Find root cause. Output: (a) analysis, (b) candidate fix locations, (c) any vault precedents. PLAN/ANALYSIS ONLY — do not modify any files.
notes: Hardest shape. Pin should be a real bug under investigation at the time of capture; baseline output should include the actual conclusions reached. Replay tests if the agent re-derives similar conclusions.
